title: ERCOT AS Plan JSON API
description:
DAM Ancillary Service Plan

This dataset contains the hourly Ancillary Service requirements in ERCOT for each
hour of the current day-ahead market day as well as the following six days.

Each day’s publication contains the quantity of procurements for each Ancillary
Service type over the next 168 hours, these types include: *ERCOT Contingency
Reserve Servic*e (ECRS), *Non-Spinning Responsive Reserves* (NSPIN), *Regulation
Down* (REGDN), *Regulation Up* (REGUP), and *Responsive Reserves* (RRS).
